task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Dell XPS 15 (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $1799.00 and wholesale is $1259.00. Product features: Laptop with 12th Gen Intel Core processors and OLED display option. Reference: https://www.dell.com/en-us/shop/dell-laptops/xps-15-laptop/spd/xps-15-laptop

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Dell XPS 15. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Dell XPS 15. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
